subject: Can't log in to my account
body: Hi, since this morning I keep getting 'invalid credentials' even after resetting my password twice. Can you help me regain access?

subject: Dashboard shows blank charts
body: The analytics dashboard loads but all the charts are empty since the last update. Other pages work fine.

subject: How do I export my data?
body: Quick question - is there a way to export all my records to CSV? I couldn't find it in settings.

subject: API returning 500 errors in production
body: Our integration started getting 500s about an hour ago on the /orders endpoint. This is blocking our customers. Please advise urgently.

subject: Interested in Enterprise plan
body: We're a team of 120 and evaluating tools for Q3. Could you share Enterprise pricing and whether you support SSO and a dedicated CSM?

subject: Demo request
body: Hi! Saw your product on a webinar. Can we book a 30-minute demo next week for our leadership team?

subject: Volume discount?
body: If we commit to a 2-year contract for 500 seats, what kind of discount can you offer?

subject: Invoice #4092 looks wrong
body: We were charged for 50 seats but only have 30 active users this month. Can you review invoice #4092 and issue a correction?

subject: Update credit card on file
body: Our card expired. How do I update the payment method so our subscription doesn't lapse?

subject: Refund for duplicate charge
body: I was billed twice this month for the Pro plan. Please refund the duplicate charge.

subject: Receipt for January
body: Could you send me the receipt/invoice PDF for January for our records? Thanks.

subject: Congratulations! You've won a $1000 gift card
body: Click here now to claim your exclusive reward before it expires!!! Limited time only. http://totally-legit-prizes.example

subject: Boost your SEO rankings overnight
body: Dear webmaster, we can get your site to #1 on Google guaranteed. Reply STOP to unsubscribe. Buy our backlinks package today.

subject: Partnership opportunity
body: Hello, I run a community newsletter and wondered if you'd be open to a content collaboration or guest post swap.

subject: Thank you!
body: Just wanted to say your support team was fantastic last week. No action needed, keep it up!

subject: Press inquiry
body: I'm a journalist writing about your industry. Could someone from your comms team reach out for a quick comment?
